member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState
member.summary: Represents the values being tracked for a particular joint.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState.None
member.summary: No data is currently being tracked for a joint.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState.Radius
member.summary: Radius of current joint.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState.Pose
member.summary: Pose of current joint.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState.LinearVelocity
member.summary: Linear velocity of current joint.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState.AngularVelocity
member.summary: Angular velocity of current joint.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState.WillNeverBeValid
member.summary: Joint was marked as not being part of the hand layout for the current provider.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID
member.summary: Represents the type of a hand joint. If you wish to convert it to an index, call .ToIndex() on the joint ID.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.Invalid
member.summary: Invalid ID.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.BeginMarker
member.summary: Marks the beginning of joints, or start of an array of data related to them. Casting this to an integer type will not result in a correct start. Use instead.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.Wrist
member.summary: Joint for the wrist.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.Palm
member.summary: Represents the palm of the hand.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.ThumbMetacarpal
member.summary: Metacarpal joint of the thumb.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.ThumbProximal
member.summary: Proximal joint of the thumb.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.ThumbDistal
member.summary: Distal joint of the thumb.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.ThumbTip
member.summary: Tip of the thumb.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.IndexMetacarpal
member.summary: Metacarpal joint of the index finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.IndexProximal
member.summary: Proximal joint of the index finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.IndexIntermediate
member.summary: Intermediate joint of the index finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.IndexDistal
member.summary: Distal joint of the index finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.IndexTip
member.summary: Tip of the index finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.MiddleMetacarpal
member.summary: Metacarpal joint of the middle finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.MiddleProximal
member.summary: Proximal joint of the middle finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.MiddleIntermediate
member.summary: Intermediate joint of the middle finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.MiddleDistal
member.summary: Distal joint of the middle finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.MiddleTip
member.summary: Tip of the middle finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.RingMetacarpal
member.summary: Metacarpal joint of the ring finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.RingProximal
member.summary: Proximal joint of the ring finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.RingIntermediate
member.summary: Intermediate joint of the ring finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.RingDistal
member.summary: Distal joint of the ring finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.RingTip
member.summary: Tip of the ring finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.LittleMetacarpal
member.summary: Metacarpal joint of the little finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.LittleProximal
member.summary: Proximal joint of the little finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.LittleIntermediate
member.summary: Intermediate joint of the little finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.LittleDistal
member.summary: Distal joint of the little finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.LittleTip
member.summary: Tip of the little finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID.EndMarker
member.summary: Marks the end of joints, or size of an array of data related to them. Casting this to an integer type will not result in a correct count. Use instead.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.Handedness
member.summary: Represents which hand is being referred to.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.Handedness.Invalid
member.summary: Invalid hand. Will never be usable. Use or to obtain a valid hand.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.Handedness.Left
member.summary: Left hand.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.Handedness.Right
member.summary: Right hand.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID
member.summary: Represents a finger on either hand. Useful with the and APIs.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID.Thumb
member.summary: Represents the thumb.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID.Index
member.summary: Represents the index finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID.Middle
member.summary: Represents the middle finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID.Ring
member.summary: Represents the ring finger.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID.Little
member.summary: Represents the little finger.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointIDUtility
member.summary: Houses extension and utility methods for .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointIDUtility.ToIndex(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID)
member.summary: Call .ToIndex() on a to get its corresponding index into an array of joint data.
member.param: ID of the joint to convert to an index.
member.returns: The index matching the ID passed in.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointIDUtility.FromIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Call this to get the corresponding from an index into an array of associated data.
member.param: Index to convert to an ID.
member.returns: The ID matching the index passed in.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointIDUtility.GetFrontJointID(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID)
member.summary: Gets the metacarpal of a given .
member.param: ID of the finger of which you want the first .
member.returns: First for the given finger in an object's list of joints.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointIDUtility.GetBackJointID(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandFingerID)
member.summary: Gets the tip of a given .
member.param: ID of the finger you want the last of.
member.returns: Last for the given finger in an object's list of joints.
member.remarks: Use with to iterate through the joints of a finger.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags
member.summary: The flags in the extension for each hand that can be read from and casting to this type.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.None
member.summary: No flags are valid.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.Computed
member.summary: Data for this hand has been computed.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.Valid
member.summary: The aim pose is generally pointed away from the face and is valid for use with UI.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.IndexPinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the index finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.MiddlePinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the middle finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.RingPinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the ring finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.LittlePinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the little finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.SystemGesture
member.summary: Indicates whether a system gesture is being performed (when the palm of the hand is facing the headset).

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.DominantHand
member.summary: Indicates whether the hand these flags were retrieved from is the dominant hand.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags.MenuPressed
member.summary: Indicates whether the menu gesture button is pressed.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand
member.summary:
A based off the data exposed in the
Meta Hand Tracking Aim extension. Enabled through [Meta Hand Tracking Aim](xref:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim) or by enabling hand-tracking in the Oculus plug-in if the Input System back-end is enabled.
member.remarks:
For this type to function, you must enable hand-tracking and be running with either the OpenXR or Oculus plug-in.
The and inherited from represent the aim pose. You can use these values to discover the target for pinch gestures, when appropriate.
Use the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin) in the scene to position and orient the device properly. If you are using this data to set the Transform of a GameObject in the scene hierarchy, you can set the local position and rotation of the Transform and make it a child of the CameraOffset object below the XROrigin. Otherwise, you can use the Transform of the CameraOffset to transform the data into world space.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.left
member.summary: The left-hand that contains s that surface data in the Meta Hand Tracking Aim extension.
member.remarks: It is recommended that you treat this as read-only, and do not set it yourself. It will be set for you if hand-tracking has been enabled and if you are running with either the OpenXR or Oculus plug-in.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.right
member.summary: The right-hand that contains s that surface data in the Meta Hand Tracking Aim extension.
member.remarks: It is recommended that you treat this as read-only, and do not set it yourself. It will be set for you if hand-tracking has been enabled and if you are running with either the OpenXR or Oculus plug-in.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.pressThreshold
member.summary: The pinch amount required to register as being pressed for the purposes of , , , and .

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.indexPressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the index finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.middlePressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the middle finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.ringPressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the ring finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.littlePressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the little finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.aimFlags
member.summary: Cast the result of reading this to to examine the value.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthIndex
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the index finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthMiddle
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the middle finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthRing
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the ring finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthLittle
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the little finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.FinishSetup
member.summary: Perform final initialization tasks after the control hierarchy has been put into place.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.CreateHand(UnityEngine.XR.InputDeviceCharacteristics)
member.summary: Creates a and adds it to the Input System.
member.param: Additional characteristics to build the hand device with besides and .
member.returns: A retrieved from .
member.remarks: It is recommended that you do not call this yourself. It will be called for you at the appropriate time if hand-tracking has been enabled and if you are running with either the OpenXR or Oculus plug-in.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.UpdateHand(System.Boolean,UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags,UnityEngine.Pose,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Queues update events in the Input System based on the supplied hand. It is not recommended that you call this directly. This will be called for you when appropriate.
member.param: Whether the hand root pose is valid.
The aim flags to update in the Input System.
The aim pose to update in the Input System. Used if the hand root is tracked.
The pinch strength for the index finger to update in the Input System.
The pinch strength for the middle finger to update in the Input System.
The pinch strength for the ring finger to update in the Input System.
The pinch strength for the little finger to update in the Input System.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimHand.UpdateHand(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.MetaAimFlags,UnityEngine.Pose,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Queues update events in the Input System based on the supplied hand. It is not recommended that you call this directly. This will be called for you when appropriate.
member.param: The aim flags to update in the Input System.
The aim pose to update in the Input System.
The pinch strength for the index finger to update in the Input System.
The pinch strength for the middle finger to update in the Input System.
The pinch strength for the ring finger to update in the Input System.
The pinch strength for the little finger to update in the Input System.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking
member.summary: This enables the use of hand-tracking data in OpenXR through the . It enables XR_EXT_hand_tracking in the underlying runtime. To retrieve hand data, use the retrieved from .
member.remarks:
For this extension to be available, you must install the
XR Hands package.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.featureId
member.summary: The feature ID string. This is used to give the feature a well known ID for reference.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.extensionString
member.summary: The OpenXR Extension string. OpenXR uses this to check if this extension is available or enabled. See hand interaction extension documentation for more information on this OpenXR extension.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.subsystem
member.summary: The that retrieves hand data from its provider. Will only be valid when this feature is enabled and running. To subscribe to updates, use .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.OnSystemChange(System.UInt64)
member.summary: See .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.OnInstanceCreate(System.UInt64)
member.summary: See .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.OnAppSpaceChange(System.UInt64)
member.summary: See .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.OnSessionCreate(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Called after xrCreateSession.
member.remarks: Creates an with the OpenXR provider.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.OnSubsystemStart
member.summary: Called after the OpenXR loader has started its subsystems.
member.remarks: Starts the and automatic updating for it. To subscribe to updates, use .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.OnSubsystemStop
member.summary: Called before the OpenXR loader stops its subsystems.
member.remarks: Stops the and automatic updating for it.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.HandTracking.OnSubsystemDestroy
member.summary: Called before the OpenXR loader destroys its subsystems.
member.remarks: Destroys the .

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim
member.summary:
This enables the use of Meta's hand-tracking aim data in OpenXR. It will not work without also enabling the feature. It enables
XR_FB_hand_tracking_aim in the underlying runtime. This creates new s with the characteristic where the and represent the aim pose exposed by this extension.
member.remarks:
For this extension to be available, you must install the
XR Hands package.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.featureId
member.summary: The feature ID string. This is used to give the feature a well known ID for reference.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.extensionString
member.summary: The OpenXR Extension string. OpenXR uses this to check if this extension is available or enabled. See Meta hand-tracking aim documentation for more information on this OpenXR extension.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.deviceProductName
member.summary: The device product name used when creating the s that represent each hand in the extension.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.deviceManufacturerName
member.summary: The device manufacturer name used when creating the s that represent each hand in the extension.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.OnSubsystemStart
member.summary: See .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.OnSubsystemStop
member.summary: See .

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.leftHand
member.summary: (Deprecated) The left-hand that contains s that surface data in the Meta Hand Tracking Aim extension.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.rightHand
member.summary: (Deprecated) The right-hand that contains s that surface data in the Meta Hand Tracking Aim extension.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags
member.summary: (Deprecated) Use instead.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.None
member.summary: No flags are valid.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.Computed
member.summary: Data for this hand has been computed.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.Valid
member.summary: The aim pose is valid. Retrieve this data from and that inherits.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.IndexPinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the index finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.MiddlePinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the middle finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.RingPinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the ring finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.LittlePinching
member.summary: Indicates whether the little finger is pinching with the thumb. Only valid when the pinch strength retrieved from is at a full strength of 1.0.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.SystemGesture
member.summary: Indicates whether a system gesture is being performed (when the palm of the hand is facing the headset).

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.DominantHand
member.summary: Indicates whether the hand these flags were retrieved from is the dominant hand.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.AimFlags.MenuPressed
member.summary: Indicates whether the menu gesture button is pressed.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand
member.summary: (Deprecated) A based off the data exposed in the Meta Hand Tracking Aim extension. Use instead of .

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.pressThreshold
member.summary: The pinch amount required to register as being pressed for the purposes of , , , and .

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.indexPressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the index finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.middlePressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the middle finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.ringPressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the ring finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.littlePressed
member.summary: A [ButtonControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.ButtonControl) that represents whether the pinch between the little finger and the thumb is mostly pressed (greater than a threshold of 0.8 contained in ).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.aimFlags
member.summary: (Deprecated) Cast the result of reading this to to examine the value. Use instead of .

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthIndex
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the index finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthMiddle
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the middle finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthRing
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the ring finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.pinchStrengthLittle
member.summary: An [AxisControl](xref:UnityEngine.InputSystem.Controls.AxisControl) that represents the pinch strength between the little finger and the thumb.
member.remarks: A value of 0 denotes no pinch at all, while a value of 1 denotes a full pinch.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.MetaHandTrackingAim.MetaAimHand.FinishSetup
member.summary: Perform final initialization tasks after the control hierarchy has been put into place.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.OpenXRHandProvider
member.summary: Hand tracking provider for the OpenXR platform.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.OpenXRHandProvider.Start
member.summary: See .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.OpenXRHandProvider.Stop
member.summary: See .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.OpenXR.OpenXRHandProvider.Destroy
member.summary: See .

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHand
member.summary: Represents a hand from an . Do not create this yourself - get hand objects from the and properties of the .
member.remarks: See [Hand tracking](xref:xrhands-tracking-data) for a description of the hand data model and how to access the tracking data.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHand.GetJoint(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID)
member.summary: Retrieves an by its ID.
member.remarks: The joint data is stored in an internal native array that isn't copied if you make a shallow copy of an XRHand object. This native array is modified each time A hand update occurs. Calling this function from a copied XRHand retrieves the latest hand data, not the data from when the hand object was copied. To take a snapshot of the joint data for use later, you must copy each individual object.
member.param: ID of the required joint.
member.returns: The corresponding the ID passed in.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHand.rootPose
member.summary: Root pose for the hand.
member.value: Located at the wrist joint, the forward vector of the hand points in the direction of the fingers.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHand.handedness
member.summary: Represents which hand this is.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHand.isTracked
member.summary: Whether the subsystem is currently tracking this hand's root pose and joints.
member.value: Indicates the tracking status as of the last hand data update.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHand.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the XRHand.
member.returns: String representation of the value.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice
member.summary: An that surfaces common controller data populated by hand joint poses. Devices will only be created if hand-tracking is enabled in the build settings for the target platform.
member.remarks:
The and inherited from represent the wrist pose.
Use the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin) in the scene to position and orient the device and gesture poses properly. If you are using this data to set the Transform of a GameObject in the scene hierarchy, you can set the local position and rotation of the Transform and make it a child of the CameraOffset object below the XROrigin. Otherwise, you can use the Transform of the CameraOffset to transform the data into world space.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.leftHand
member.summary: The left-hand that contains s that surface common controller data populated by hand joint poses.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.rightHand
member.summary: The right-hand that contains s that surface common controller data populated by hand joint poses.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.gripPosition
member.summary: Position of the grip pose, representing the palm. When transformed relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin), the position will be in the correct position in the scene relative to the user.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.gripRotation
member.summary: Rotation of the grip pose, representing the palm. When transformed relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin), the rotation will be in the correct orientation in the scene relative to the user.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.pokePosition
member.summary: Position of the poke pose, representing the index finger's tip. When transformed relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin), the position will be in the correct position in the scene relative to the user.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.pokeRotation
member.summary: Rotation of the poke pose, representing the index finger's tip. When transformed relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin), the rotation will be in the correct orientation in the scene relative to the user.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.pinchPosition
member.summary: Position of the pinch pose, representing the thumb's tip. When transformed relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin), the position will be in the correct position in the scene relative to the user.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.pinchRotation
member.summary: Rotation of the pinch pose, representing the thumb's tip. When transformed relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin), the rotation will be in the correct orientation in the scene relative to the user.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandDevice.FinishSetup
member.summary: Perform final initialization tasks after the control hierarchy has been put into place.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint
member.summary: Represents a joint of an .
member.remarks:
The term "joint" should be taken loosely in this context. In addition to the anatomical finger joints, the list of joints includes the fingertips, a point on the palm and a point on the wrist. See for the full list of joints.
Refer to [Hand data model](xref:xrhands-data-model) for a description of the joint locations and the data they contain.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.id
member.summary: The ID of this joint.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.handedness
member.summary: Denotes which hand this joint is on.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.trackingState
member.summary: Represents which tracking data is valid.
member.value: A flag is set for each valid type of data. If the The flag is set when this joind ID isn't supported by the hand data provider.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.TryGetRadius(System.Single@)
member.summary: Retrieves the joint's radius, if available.
member.param: Assigned the tracked radius of this joint, if successful. Set to zero, if unsuccessful.
member.returns: Returns if successful and the radius was filled out with valid tracking data, returns otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.TryGetPose(UnityEngine.Pose@)
member.summary: Retrieves the joint's pose, if available.
member.param: Assigned the tracked pose of this joint, if successful. Set to , if unsuccessful.
member.returns: Returns if successful and the joint pose was filled out with valid tracking data, returns otherwise.
member.remarks:
Joint poses are relative to the real-world point chosen by the user's device.
To transform to world space so that the joint appears in the correct location relative to the user, transform the pose based on the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin).

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.TryGetLinearVelocity(UnityEngine.Vector3@)
member.summary: Retrieves the joint's linear velocity vector, if available.
member.param: Assigned the tracked linear velocity of this joint, if successful. Set to , if unsuccessful.
member.returns: Returns if successful and the velocity was filled out with valid tracking data, returns otherwise.
member.remarks: To transform to world space so that the vector has the correct direction relative to the user, rotate this by the rotation of the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin).

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.TryGetAngularVelocity(UnityEngine.Vector3@)
member.summary: Retrieves the joint's angular velocity vector, if available
member.param: Assigned the tracked angular velocity of this joint, if successful. Set to , if unsuccessful.
member.returns: Returns if successful and the angular velocity filled out with valid tracking data, returns otherwise.
member.remarks: To transform to world space so that the vector has the correct direction relative to the user, rotate this by the rotation of the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin).

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the XRHandJoint.
member.returns: String representation of the value.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility
member.summary: Utility methods for a provider to a .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility.CreateJoint(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.Handedness,UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState,UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID,UnityEngine.Pose,System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Vector3)
member.summary: Create a fully configurable joint with at least a pose in hand space, tracking state, and ID.
member.param: Denotes whether the joint being created is on the left or right hand.
The tracking state flags associated with this joint, representing which fields of the are valid.
The of the joint. When filling out an element of an array of , the index must be converted with .
The pose of the joint in session space, relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin).
The radius of the joint. The default value is 0f.
The linear velocity of the joint in hand space (relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin)). The default value is Vector3.zero.
The angular velocity of the joint in hand space (relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin)). The default value is Vector3.zero.
member.returns: An with the given pose and other supplied data.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility.SubsystemUpdater
member.summary: Use this with your provider (if hand-tracking is enabled in your build settings) to have the subsystem automatically update. Users can subscribe to to respond to updates instead of waiting until a following update step. Makes use of UnityEngine.LowLevel.PlayerLoop to insert this automatic update at the beginning of the EarlyUpdate.XRUpdate loop.
member.remarks: If the Input System backend is enabled, this will also create and s which update themselves from the callback.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility.SubsystemUpdater.#ctor(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem)
member.summary: Initializes and returns an instance of . You should create this in your plug-in once the is created.
member.param: The to update automatically.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility.SubsystemUpdater.Start
member.summary: Starts the automatic updating of the . You should call this from your plug-in when calling Start on the subsystem.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility.SubsystemUpdater.Stop
member.summary: Stops the automatic updating of the . You should call this from your plug-in when calling Stop on the subsystem.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility.SubsystemUpdater.Destroy
member.summary: Destroys the automatic updating of the . You should call this from your plug-in when calling Destroy on the subsystem.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandProviderUtility.CreateJoint(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointTrackingState,UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJointID,UnityEngine.Pose,System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Vector3)
member.summary: Create a fully configurable joint with at least a pose in hand space, tracking state, and ID.
member.param: The tracking state flags associated with this joint, representing which fields of the are valid.
The of the joint. When filling out an element of an array of , the index must be converted with .
The pose of the joint in session space, relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin).
The radius of the joint. The default value is 0f.
The linear velocity of the joint in hand space (relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin)). The default value is Vector3.zero.
The angular velocity of the joint in hand space (relative to the [XROrigin](xref:Unity.XR.CoreUtils.XROrigin)). The default value is Vector3.zero.
member.returns: An with the given pose and other supplied data.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandSubsystemProvider
member.summary: Methods to implement by the implementing provider for an .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandSubsystemProvider.GetHandLayout(Unity.Collections.NativeArray{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Gets the layout of hand joints for this provider, by having the provider mark each index corresponding to a get marked as if the provider attempts to track that joint.
member.remarks: Called once on creation so that before the subsystem is even started, so the user can immediately create a valid hierarchical structure as soon as they get a reference to the subsystem without even needing to start it.
member.param: Each index corresponds to a . For each joint that the provider will attempt to track, mark that spot as by calling .ToIndex() on that ID.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.ProviderImplementation.XRHandSubsystemProvider.TryUpdateHands(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateType,UnityEngine.Pose@,Unity.Collections.NativeArray{UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint},UnityEngine.Pose@,Unity.Collections.NativeArray{UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandJoint})
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve current hand-tracking data from the provider.
member.param: Informs the provider which kind of timing the update is being requested under.
Update this and include XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccesFlags.LeftHandRootPose in the return value to update the left hand's root pose.

Array of hand joints to fill out for the left hand. These are initialized with a copy of the current joint data for the left hand, so if the last known tracking data for a particular joint is still fine, you don't need to fill out that data again. If you update these, include XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccesFlags.LeftHandJoints in the return value to have the changes reflected in the subsystem.
Update this and include XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccesFlags.RightHandRootPose in the return value to update the right hand's root pose.

Array of hand joints to fill out for the right hand. These are initialized with a copy of the current joint data for the right hand, so if the last known tracking data for a particular joint is still fine, you don't need to fill out that data again. If you update these, include XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccesFlags.RightHandJoints in the return value to have the changes reflected in the subsystem.
member.returns: Returns to describe which tracking data was successfully updated.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem
member.summary: A subsystem for detecting and tracking hands and their corresponding joint pose data.
member.remarks:
The XRHandSystem class is the main entry point for accessing hand tracking data provided by an XR device. A provider implementation that reads tracking data from the user's device and provides updates to this subsystem must also be available. The XR Hands package includes a provider implementation for OpenXR.
Get an instance for this XRHandSubsystem from the active XR loader, as described in [Get the XRHandSubsystem instance](xref:xrhands-access-data#get-instance).
For lowest latency, read the tracking data available from the and properties in a delegate function assigned to the callback. This callback is invoked twice per frame, once near the MonoBehaviour.Update event and once near the event. The update provides the lowest latency between hand motion and rendering, but occurs too late to affect physics. In addition, trying to perform too much work during the BeforeRender callback can negatively impact framerate. For best results, update game logic affected by hand tracking in a update and perform a final update of hand visuals in a update.
Refer to [Hand tracking data](xref:xrhands-tracking-data) for more information.
member.summary: A subystem for detecting and tracking hands and their corresponding joint pose data.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.#ctor
member.summary: Constructs a subsystem. Do not invoke directly.
member.remarks:
Do not call this constructor if you are an application developer consuming hand tracking data. Instead, get an instance for this XRHandTrackingSubsystem from the active XR loader, as described in [Get the XRHandSubsystem instance](xref:xrhands-access-data#get-instance).
If you are implementing an XR hand data provider, call Create on the or call
instead of invoking this constructor.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.leftHand
member.summary: Gets the left that is being tracked by this subsystem.
member.remarks:
Check the property to determine what data associated with this hand was successfully updated in the last update, if any. The value is also passed to the callback function assigned to .
Refer to [Hand data model](xref:xrhands-data-model) for a description of the available hand tracking data.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.rightHand
member.summary: Gets the right that is being tracked by this subsystem.
member.remarks:
Check the property to determine what data associated with this hand was successfully updated in the last update, if any. The value is also passed to the callback function assigned to .
Refer to [Hand data model](xref:xrhands-data-model) for a description of the available hand tracking data.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.jointsInLayout
member.summary: Indicates which joints in the list are supported by the current hand data provider.
member.remarks:
Hand data providers might not support tracking every joint in the list. This array contains an element for each possible joint. A value of true indicates the the current provider supports tracking the associated joint.
To get the correct array index for a joint, call on the in question.
Refer to [Get supported joints array](xref:xrhands-access-data#joint-layout) for additional information.
This array will already be valid as soon as you have a reference to a subsystem (in other words, it's filled out before the subsystem is returned by a call to XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Create).

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.updateSuccessFlags
member.summary: Describes what data on either hand was updated during the most recent hand update.
member.remarks:
This property updated every time the hand data is updated, which only occurs while this XRHandSubsystem is running.
The value is also passed to the callback function assigned to .
member.value: The flags for the most recent update. Applies to the and properties.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccessFlags
member.summary: Describes what data on either hand was updated during the call.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccessFlags.None
member.summary: No data was successfully updated for either hand.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccessFlags.LeftHandRootPose
member.summary: The root pose of was updated.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccessFlags.LeftHandJoints
member.summary: The joints in were updated.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccessFlags.RightHandRootPose
member.summary: The root pose of was updated.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccessFlags.RightHandJoints
member.summary: The joints in were updated.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateSuccessFlags.All
member.summary: All possible valid data retrieved (hand root poses, and joints for both hands).

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateType
member.summary: The timing of a hand update during a frame.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateType.Dynamic
member.summary: Corresponds to timing similar or close to MonoBehaviour.Update.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateType.BeforeRender
member.summary: Corresponds to timing similar or close to .

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.updatedHands
member.summary: A callback invoked for each hand update.
member.remarks:
This callback is invoked twice per frame, once near the MonoBehaviour.Update event and once near the event. The update provides the lowest latency between hand motion and rendering, but occurs too late to affect physics. In addition, trying to perform too much work during the BeforeRender callback can negatively impact framerate. For best results, update game logic affected by hand tracking in a update and update hand visuals in a update.
The delegate assigned to this property must take three parameters, which have the following types and assigned values when the callback is invoked:
* : contains a reference to this subsystem. * : the flags indicating which data could be updated. * : the update timing.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.trackingAcquired
member.summary: A callback invoked when the subsystem begins tracking a hand's root pose and joints.
member.remarks:
This is called before .
The delegate assigned to this property must take one parameter of type , which is assigned a reference to the hand whose tracking was acquired.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.trackingLost
member.summary: A callback invoked when the subsystem stops tracking a hand's root pose and joints.
member.remarks:
This is called before .
The delegate assigned to this property must take one parameter of type , which is assigned a reference to the hand whose tracking was lost.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.TryUpdateHands(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.UpdateType)
member.summary: Request an update from the hand data provider. Application developers consuming hand tracking data should not call this function.
member.param: Informs the provider which kind of timing the update is being requested under.
member.returns: Returns to describe what data was updated successfully.
member.remarks:
This function must be called by the subsystem implementation to request an update from the hand data provider.
When an update is complete, the updated data is available from the and properties. The callback is invoked.
The update is performed immediately. If you request an update timing that occurs in the future, for example, requesting from a MonoBehaviour.Update function, then the provider predicts what the hand data will be at the requested time.
If overriding this method in a derived type, it is expected that you call base.TryUpdateHands(updateType) and return what it returns.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.OnCreate
member.summary: Called by Unity before the subsystem is returned from a call to XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Create.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.OnDestroy
member.summary: Called by Unity before the subsystem is fully destroyed during a call to XRHandSubsystem.Destroy.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystem.handsUpdated
member.summary: Obsolete. Use instead.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor
member.summary: Describes the capabilities of an .

member.name: T:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo
member.summary: Construction information for the .

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.id
member.summary: A string identifier used to name the subsystem provider.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.providerType
member.summary: Specifies the provider implementation type to use for instantiation.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.subsystemTypeOverride
member.summary: Specifies the -derived type that forwards casted calls to its provider.
member.value: The type of the subsystem to use for instantiation. If null, will be instantiated.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.GetHashCode
member.summary: Generates a hash suitable for use with containers like HashSet and Dictionary.
member.returns: A hash code generated from this object's fields.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.Equals(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo)
member.summary: Tests for equality.
member.param: The other to compare against.
member.returns: Returns if every field in is equal to this , otherwise returns .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Tests for equality.
member.param: The `object` to compare against.
member.returns: Returns if is of type and also returns ; otherwise returns .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.op_Equality(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo,UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo)
member.summary: Tests for equality. Same as .
member.param: The left-hand side of the comparison.
The right-hand side of the comparison.
member.returns: Returns if is equal to , otherwise returns .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo.op_Inequality(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo,UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo)
member.summary: Tests for inequality. Same as `!`.
member.param: The left-hand side of the comparison.
The right-hand side of the comparison.
member.returns: Returns if is not equal to , otherwise returns .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Register(UnityEngine.XR.Hands.XRHandSubsystemDescriptor.Cinfo)
member.summary: Registers a new descriptor with the SubsystemManager.
member.param: The construction information for the new descriptor.
